patterns: 45s timeouts (14 tests) — indicates element not rendering or backend hung
Test not found in worker (4 tests) — worker crash or route redirect breaking tests
Assertion failures on UI elements (7 tests) — features not working as expected
rootCauses: API Tokens page completely broken (4 failures) — likely backend issue or DB migration missing
Confirm Dialog component not rendering (3 failures) — critical UX component broken
Mobile responsive tests failing (3 failures) — mobile layout broken
Phase 2/3 features broken (6 failures) — metrics, dashboard customize, time range selectors
/users route redirect causing test worker crashes (2-4 failures) — test files need update for new /settings/users route
analysis.impact: CRITICAL — 25/137 failures (18.2%). Phase 1 features work correctly, but significant regressions in existing features.
analysis.recommendation: DO NOT DEPLOY. Fix critical regressions before Phase 1 can ship.
